summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge action is safe from the compacted preflight because mergeability is unknown or dirty and the artifact does not prove a clean Codex /review plus resolved bot-review findings. Narrow contributor-branch repair is concrete for #87702. #88479 needs maintainer judgment because the delta is broad, has an unresolved failing check, and has repeated Codex review-bot comments without hydrated finding resolution.

repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for source PR #87702 by @sweetcornna. Rebase/resolve the dirty branch against current main, preserve the narrow env-cleanup behavior, run targeted vitest coverage plus pnpm check:changed, then run Codex /review and address any findings before merge consideration.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87702
Linked issue: #57858
Credit: implementation and attribution should remain with @sweetcornna.
credit_notes: Credit @sweetcornna as the contributor author when repairing or finalizing this PR.
